overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage showing a character in dark wizard robes walking along a stormy coastal cliffside path. The character traverses from a fenced trail section through open cliffside terrain with ocean views, eventually ascending a wooden lookout platform to survey the misty coastal landscape and distant ruins.

scene_state.functional_zone: coastal cliff path with wooden fencing

events.description: wooden fence ends and path opens to wide cliffside vista

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the coastal path beside a wooden fence with a bird perched atop one post

notable_agents.action: bird perched on top of wooden fence post

entered.detail: weathered wooden fence running along the right side of the cliff path
tall rocky cliff wall forming the left boundary of the path
narrow dirt path winding along the cliff edge
rough ocean waves visible below the cliff edge

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a narrow dirt trail between a rocky cliff face and a wooden fence, with stormy skies overhead and ocean waves visible to the right. A bird perches on the fence before the path opens up at the end of the segment.

scene_state.functional_zone: open coastal cliff trail with ocean views

agents.ego_description: walking along the open cliff edge with expansive ocean views to the right, approaching distant rock formations

entered.detail: tall wooden poles with tattered flags marking the path along the cliff
massive rock outcroppings visible in the distance ahead
clumps of dry brown grass growing along the cliff edge

segments.scene_description: The path opens into a wide coastal trail with the wooden fence now behind. The character continues walking past dry grass tufts and wooden flag poles, with the ocean visible below and large rock formations looming ahead in the misty distance.

scene_state.functional_zone: wooden lookout platform with magical emblem

events.description: character ascends wooden stairs to reach the upper platform level
character stops walking and pans camera to survey the coastal vista

agents.ego_description: climbing wooden stairs to the platform top, then walking across a green emblem to the edge to look out at the misty coastal ruins

entered.detail: elevated wooden fortification with stairs and railings overlooking the coast
steep wooden staircase leading up to the main platform deck
large circular platform with glowing green geometric pattern on the wooden floor
ancient stone ruins visible through the mist across the water
metal lantern suspended from wooden post on the platform

segments.scene_description: The character approaches and climbs a wooden lookout platform, ascending stairs to reach a deck with a glowing green circular emblem. From this vantage point, the character surveys the misty coastal landscape with ancient ruins visible in the distance while standing under hanging lanterns.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement along a stormy cliffside path that gradually ascends to a high vantage point overlooking a misty coast. It begins with the character walking a narrow dirt trail hemmed in by a rocky cliff face and a wooden fence, where a solitary bird perches as the path begins to widen. As the enclosure of the fence falls away, the scene opens into a broad coastal trail characterized by tufts of dry grass and wooden flag poles, with large rock formations looming through the mist in the distance. The camera then follows the character as they approach and climb a set of wooden stairs, ascending onto a lookout platform adorned with hanging lanterns and a glowing green circular emblem. Finally, the perspective expands from this height to survey the vast, foggy landscape and the silhouette of ancient ruins on the horizon.
